news.title: A Fed interest-rate hike could trigger a short-term stock selloff, but history points to a big silver lining
news.description: The immediate impact of hiking cycles is often negative but, zooming out, stock markets recover

news.title: Why Citigroup is the one to watch when banks report earnings this week
news.description: Among the largest U.S. banks, Citigroup is expected to show the greatest improvement by one important measure. But it still has a long way to go to reach its own performance target.

news.title: Oil prices surge as much as 5% after Iran declares Strait of Hormuz is closed
news.description: The week is kicking off with fresh spikes for oil prices as the U.S. and Iran continued to exchange attacks.

news.title: The No. 1 decision for aging retirees: Stay at home or move into a senior community?
news.description: Why staying in your longtime home requires more planning than you think.

news.title: ‘I’ve no idea how they got her number’: My student-loan servicer called a friend after I missed a payment. Is that legal?
news.description: “She said it’s the second message they have left.”

news.title: ‘I’d hate to end up with an unexpected tax bill’: I’m 73 and still work full time. Can I avoid paying taxes on my Social Security benefits?
news.description: “I’m actually earning more each week than I ever have before.”

news.title: My insurance company said my roof lost a few tiles. Loss adjusters found $10,000 in storm damage. How could this happen?
news.description: “My house shook violently from the wind.”

news.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
news.description: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”
